one_time_description: Derecognition of Nak'azdli Whut'en Trust from consolidated financial statements resulting in net expense of $5,076,694 recorded in economic development expenses
economic_notes: Nak'azdli operates multiple business enterprises including Carrier Food and Fuel Ltd. (grocery/fuel), Nak'al Koh Timber Ltd. (logging), NDC LNG Limited Partnership, Nak'azdli Summit Camp Limited Partnership, and BioNorth Holdings Limited Partnership. Equity income from GBEs was $2,345,906. Natural resource contracts generated $2,711,626. BC First Nation Gaming Revenue Sharing contributed $440,397.
notes: Fiscal year 2022 only (not 2024 as template suggests). The Nak'azdli Whut'en Trust was deconsolidated in FY2022 as control was lost, resulting in a $5,076,694 one-time expense in economic development. GBE revenues and expenses for grocery store, logging, and gas station are consolidated (not equity method) in current year after reclassification from prior year GBE treatment. Total revenue including consolidated GBE revenue is $41,073,499 per segmented note; the income statement shows $32,588,945 (non-GBE) plus $8,484,554 (GBE) = $41,073,499 total. Prior year figures on income statement show non-GBE revenue/expenses only for comparability. Revenue and expense fields reflect non-GBE income statement figures. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $10,464,863 + BC/other govt $8,546,144 + FNHA $2,837,314 + PGNAETA $487,613 + CMHC $80,691 = $22,416,625. OSR = $32,588,945 - $22,416,625 = $10,172,320. BioNorth Holdings LP investment of $4,000,000 made in current year. Schedule of remuneration not included in financial statement text provided.
